series_metadata.series_title: Formal Written Complaints, Due Process Hearings and Appeals Case Files
series_metadata.series_description: The case files of due process hearing requests and state level appeals. 34 C.F.R. 300.507 (Filing a due process complaint) and 34 C.F.R. 300.514 (Finality of decision; appeal; impartial review). The case files for formal written complaints (state complaints) filed under 34 C.F.R. 300.152 (Minimum state complaint procedures)

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain five years, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain five years, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
